content.content: File created successfully at: /Users/sungjh/Projects/star1/bench/.workspaces/03-todo-cli-placebo-lSXFT1/src/cli.ts (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

input.command: rm -f todos.json && npx tsx src/cli.ts list && echo "---empty ok---" && npx tsx src/cli.ts add "buy milk" && npx tsx src/cli.ts add "walk the dog" && echo "---list---" && npx tsx src/cli.ts list && rm -f todos.json

content.content:
---empty ok---
---list---
buy milk
walk the dog

tool_use_result.stdout:
---empty ok---
---list---
buy milk
walk the dog

content.text:
Works correctly. The CLI is created at `src/cli.ts` and handles both commands:

- **`add <text>`** — appends the todo to `todos.json` (joining multiple args with spaces so unquoted text works too).
- **`list`** — prints each stored todo on its own line in insertion order; prints nothing when empty (verified above).

Todos persist in `todos.json` in the current working directory, created on first `add`.

result:
Works correctly. The CLI is created at `src/cli.ts` and handles both commands:

- **`add <text>`** — appends the todo to `todos.json` (joining multiple args with spaces so unquoted text works too).
- **`list`** — prints each stored todo on its own line in insertion order; prints nothing when empty (verified above).

Todos persist in `todos.json` in the current working directory, created on first `add`.
